data.title: Brayton Purcell LLP calls for action on artificial stone silicosis crisis, submitting statement to Congress and CA OSHSB.
data.description: In Novato, California on January 23, 2026, Brayton Purcell LLP sent a comprehensive letter to the US Congress and the California Occupational Safety and Health Standards Board addressing the increasing silicosis crisis. The letter details the severity, scope, and causes of this crisis affecting a significant number of individuals. The law firm urges action to tackle the rapidly growing issue.

data.title: Infosys opens new Zurich office to advance AI journeys, bolstering 25-year presence in Switzerland.
data.description: Infosys has recently opened a new office in Zurich, Switzerland, marking 25 years of their presence in the country. This move aims to enhance collaboration with clients and strengthen their foothold in the region. Infosys, a prominent player in digital services and consulting, traded on NSE, BSE, and NYSE under the symbols INFY, inaugurated the office to support its operations and further expand its services in Switzerland.

data.title: Ireland data center colocation market valued at USD 580 million in 2024, projected to reach USD 1.86 billion by 2030, CAGR of 21.45%.
data.description: In Dublin, the Ireland Data Center Colocation Market is thriving, with a value of USD 580 million in 2024. Experts project this market to soar to USD 1.86 billion by 2030, reflecting a notable CAGR of 21.45%. Ireland is a key player in Europe's colocation landscape as part of the FLAP-D market and currently houses 35 operational colocation data center facilities.

data.title: Article discusses how reinventing oneself can redefine career path after being stuck in a dead-end job or let go.
data.description: Struggling with a stagnant career? Feeling stuck in an unfulfilling job or recently faced a layoff? Discover how transforming yourself can reshape your professional journey. Explore how reinventing oneself can pave the way for a new career path, bringing fresh opportunities and growth. Unleash your potential and redefine success in your work life.

data.title: BitGo IPO initially surged by 35%, but then declined over Thursday and Friday trading, ahead of second day opening.
data.description: The initial public offering (IPO) of BitGo had a strong start, seeing a rise of about 35% before gradually declining during Thursday's trading session and into early trading on Friday. The crypto-related IPO continued to slide as it approached its second day of public trading.

data.title: Cerrado Gold holding conference call to address Environmental Impact Assessment opinion for Lagoa Salgada Project in Portugal.
data.description: Cerrado Gold will be hosting a management conference call to address concerns regarding the alleged negative assessment of the Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) report. The call, which will be open to investors and stakeholders, aims to discuss the implications of the purported unfavorable opinion on the company's operations. This development comes amid growing scrutiny of Cerrado Gold's environmental practices. The company is expected to provide insights and clarifications during the call, which will likely shed light on future strategies and potential challenges. This initiative reflects Cerrado Gold's commitment to transparency and proactive communication with the public, as they navigate through this issue. The conference call is slated to take place on [date], with [important numbers] being shared during the discussion.

data.title: Equinox Gold sells Brazil operations for US$1.105 billion, pays down over US$800 million debt, reducing net debt to US$150 million.
data.description: Equinox Gold has finalized the disposal of its operations in Brazil for $1.105 billion, utilizing a significant portion of the proceeds to repay over $800 million in debt promptly.

data.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang heading to China to reopen market for AI chips, expected to meet buyers.
data.description: Nvidia Corp's CEO Jensen Huang is planning a trip to China towards the end of January to focus on reestablishing the market for the company's AI chips. Huang will be attending company gatherings ahead of the Lunar New Year celebrations in mid-February and is also scheduled to visit Beijing. While it is uncertain if he will meet with top officials, Huang is anticipated to engage with potential buyers in China to address recent supply chain challenges affecting the distribution of U.S.-endorsed products. This news was reported by Bloomberg and CNBC, with Huang's upcoming visit aiming to enhance Nvidia's presence in the Chinese market.

data.title: Equifax launches Synthetic Identity Risk product using AI to detect growing identity threat. NYSE: EFX ATLANTA, Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) unveiled a new AI-driven fraud detection tool designed to combat Synthetic Identity Fraud, a rapidly increasing threat to individuals' identities. This innovative product, Synthetic Identity Risk, aims to help clients detect and prevent this type of fraud effectively. The launch was announced in Atlanta on January 23, 2026. Synthetic Identity Fraud is noted as one of the fastest-growing identity threats, highlighting the critical need for advanced solutions such as Equifax's latest offering. This development serves as a proactive measure to safeguard individuals from potential financial losses and protect their identities in an increasingly digital world.

data.title: Bausch Health updates on RED-C Phase 3 trials evaluating amorphous-rifaximin SSD for preventing liver cirrhosis in adults.
data.description: In Laval, Quebec, on January 23, 2026, Bausch Health Companies Inc. revealed the outcomes of the worldwide Phase 3 RED-C clinical initiative studying amorphous-rifaximin solid soluble dispersion (SSD) among adult patients with liver cirrhosis. The study aimed at determining the efficacy of SSD for primary prevention purposes. The company's stocks trade on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BHC and on the TSX under the same symbol.

data.title: New policy research delves into fentanyl's rise from regulated drug to global crisis, exposing systemic failures.
data.description: In a recent study released on Jan. 23, 2026, researchers analyzed the transformation of fentanyl from a heavily controlled medication to a key factor in the worldwide overdose epidemic. The analysis emphasized the structural deficiencies that facilitated its widespread dissemination, underscoring the alarming increase in fentanyl-related incidents.

data.description: The likelihood of Bitcoin dropping to $69,000 according to prediction market odds has increased by over 100% in the past week, with BTC still trading below $90,000.

data.title: Poland data center colocation market valued at USD 370 million in 2024, projected to reach USD 810 million by 2030 with CAGR of 13.95%. Warsaw is a key hub between Western and Central-Eastern Europe.
data.description: A report on the Poland Data Center Colocation Market has been added to a leading market research firm's offerings. The market was valued at USD 370 million in 2024 and is anticipated to grow to USD 810 million by 2030, demonstrating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.95%. Poland is establishing itself as a significant Tier-2 colocation center in Europe, with Warsaw playing a crucial role as a bridge between Western and Central-Eastern Europe due to its robust connectivity infrastructure.
